description: Data availability audit for the proposed cross-system kernel consistency test. Checks whether per-image convergence values are available in the TDCOSMO2025 public release and reports what is missing.

required_data.per_image_convergence: Not available in public release; needed for independent transport prediction
required_data.per_image_potential: Not available in public release; alternative to convergence
required_data.lens_model_parameters: Available for 7 systems from TDCOSMO2025 YAML

refsdal_context.note: SN Refsdal is not in the TDCOSMO sample.
refsdal_context.source: Steps 50–52: geodesic transport ≈ +0.35 d, log-μ ≈ +14.5 d

verdict: A genuine cross-system kernel test is not possible with the current TDCOSMO2025 public release. Per-image convergence or potential values (κ_i or ψ_i at each image position) are required for an independent transport prediction, but these are not published for any of the 8 systems. The public release contains power-law lens parameters (γ, θ_E, κ_ext) and LOS convergence samples, but not per-image lensing quantities. Future releases that include per-image convergence tables or lens-model posterior maps would enable this test.
